name: Apple Cheese Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine cottage cheese, grated apples, salt, flour, honey, lemon juice, chopped almonds, and cinnamon.
2. Gently beat the egg yolks in a separate bowl until smooth.
3. Gradually add the egg yolks to the dry mixture, stirring just until combined.
4. Carefully fold in the egg whites, stirring gently until no large lumps remain.
5. Heat a griddle or non-stick skillet over medium heat and lightly coat with cooking spray.
6. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot surface to form each pancake.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges are dry, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Using a wide spatula, carefully lift one side of the pancake and gently flip it over.
9. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes on the other side, or until golden brown.
10. Repeat with remaining batter, adjusting heat as necessary to avoid burning the pancakes.
